title: Master Bundle Atlas - 152 source and handoff packets

fields.vision: Master Bundle Atlas is an evidence-governed catalogue for 152 source, handoff, and project packets.
fields.mechanism: It routes each packet through artifact identity, evidence state, public claim boundary, portfolio role, and next action so a packet becomes a feature page, source substrate, implementation backlog, private support layer, or archive for stated reasons.
fields.built_components: Verified structural coverage: 152 Master Bundle ZIPs observed; 152 per-ZIP expert briefings found; 0 missing briefings; 5,941 archive entries indexed; 4,447 text-bearing entries decoded; 0 extraction failures. The atlas page preserves the 152 briefing records as navigable public cards while warning that archive coverage is not the same thing as deployed product status.
fields.source_utilization: Source authority comes from the per-ZIP expert briefings, archive-entry registry, decoded text-bearing manifest, and portfolio-presence checks. These sources establish artifact existence, evidence state, family, intended use, and claim limit. They do not authorize stronger public claims without page-specific implementation or citation evidence.
fields.plan: Use the atlas to promote packets responsibly: first classify by evidence state, then route to feature page, source substrate, implementation backlog, private support, or archive; finally bind any stronger public claim to a named live file, route, source register, or review gate.
fields.status: Status: the Master Bundle is structurally audited and navigable in the professional package. It proves an organized 152-packet archive with full briefing coverage, not 152 deployed products.
fields.remaining_gaps: Remaining gaps: individual packet cards still need page-by-page promotion decisions; older intention-track filters should eventually be reconciled to the evidence-state taxonomy; public feature pages must cite implementation surfaces before any packet is described as live or complete.
fields.detailed_source_vision: A public map of the Master Bundle as an evidence-governed project universe. The atlas shows 152 archived source and handoff packages, explains what kind of evidence each packet provides, and distinguishes live portfolio substance from code-ready handoffs, prototypes, corpora, career/application packets, private operating-support packets, and archival lineage records.
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: The mechanism is a claim-ceiling workflow: artifact -> evidence state -> public claim limit -> portfolio role -> next action. A packet can become a feature page, source substrate, implementation backlog, private support layer, or archive only after its evidence state is named and tied to a source briefing, manifest, route, file, or review gate.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: Master Bundle Atlas is an evidence-governed catalogue for 152 source, handoff, and project packets.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: It routes each packet through artifact identity, evidence state, public claim boundary, portfolio role, and next action so a packet becomes a feature page, source substrate, implementation backlog, private support layer, or archive for stated reasons.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It matters because a large project archive only becomes professionally legible when readers can see what each packet is, what it supports, and what cannot yet be claimed from it.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: rendered correction table.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

researcher_process_map.summary: Master Bundle Atlas is an evidence-governed catalogue for 152 source, handoff, and project packets.
researcher_process_map.final_use_case: It matters because a large project archive only becomes professionally legible when readers can see what each packet is, what it supports, and what cannot yet be claimed from it.
